2022-23 UC Irvine Anteaters Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 23-12 (15-5, 1st in Big West MBB)

Coach: Russ Turner

PS/G: 74.8 (102nd of 363)

PA/G: 67.2 (90th of 363)

SRS: 4.16 (111th of 363)

SOS: -0.60 (154th of 363)

ORtg: 106.4 (125th of 363)

DRtg: 95.6 (37th of 363)

  • Big West Reg Season Champ
